title: Just 3D Spawn Eggs
description: This Pack Changes The Default Spawn Eggs With New Fresh 3D Spawn Eggs
body:
This Pack Wont Work On Vanilla Minecraft. You Must Use Hold My Items Or Punchy

![about](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c23a25019880c315acc125ca53855d1ee9f30631.png) --- This pack transforms all of default spawn eggs into unique and detailed 3D eggs, giving the game a fresh and immersive look. Inspired By Action & Stuff By Oreville Studios Thanks To arch1vways For Core Shaders. All Images Taken With Atmospherics Mod By Beash
